rest-helper
--------

* Use JSON text file to simulate REST data source

### install

<pre>
npm install rest-helper
</pre>

### usage

<pre>
var express = require('express');
var RESTHelper = require('rest-helper');
var items = new RESTHelper('items'); // items folder contains individual json files
var app = express();

app.get('/items', function (req, res) {
    items.findAll(req, res);
});
app.get('/items/:id', function (req, res) {
    items.findById(req, res);
});
app.post('/items', function (req, res) {
    items.add(req, res);
});
app.put('/items/:id', function (req, res) {
    items.updateById(req, res);
});
app.delete('/picklist.svc/view', function (req, res) {
    items.removeAll(req, res);
});
app.delete('/picklist.svc/view/:id', function (req, res) {
    items.removeById(req, res);
});

</pre>
